title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

title: Build reliable AI agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations
summary: In this post, we introduce Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations, a fully managed service for assessing AI agent performance across the development lifecycle. We walk through how the service measures agent accuracy across multiple quality dimensions. We explain the two evaluation approaches for development and production and share practical guidance for building agents you can deploy with confidence.

title: Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
summary: In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from AWS Cost Explorer, AWS Budgets, and AWS Compute Optimizer into a single interface, so your team can ask questions like "What are my top cost drivers this month?" and receive immediate answers.

title: Building an AI powered system for compliance evidence collection
summary: In this post, we show you how to build a similar system for your organization. You will learn the architecture decisions, implementation details, and deployment process that can help you automate your own compliance workflows.

title: Accelerating software delivery with agentic QA automation using Amazon Nova Act
summary: In this post, we demonstrate how to implement agentic QA automation through QA Studio, a reference solution built with Amazon Nova Act. You will see how to define tests in natural language that adapt automatically to UI changes, explore the serverless architecture that executes tests reliably at scale, and get step-by-step deployment guidance for your AWS environment.

title: AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations
summary: I'm excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. These autonomous systems work independently to achieve goals, scale massively to tackle concurrent tasks, and run persistently for hours or days without constant human oversight. Together, these agents are changing the way we secure and operate software. In preview, customers and partners report that AWS Security Agent compresses penetration testing timelines from weeks to hours and the AWS DevOps Agent supports 3–5x fast...

title: Can your governance keep pace with your AI ambitions? AI risk intelligence in the agentic era
summary: Traditional frameworks designed for static deployments cannot address the dynamic interactions that define agentic workloads. AI Risk Intelligence (AIRI), from AWS Generative AI Innovation Center, provides the automated rigor required to govern agents at enterprise scale—a fundamental reimagining of how security, operations, and governance work together systemically.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: Cohere Labs Launches Tiny Aya, Making Multilingual AI Accessible
summary: Open-weight AI designed for real-world languages that is powerful, adaptable, and efficient enough to run locally, even on a phone. Today, Cohere Labs, Cohere’s research arm, is introducing Tiny Aya, the most capable multilingual open-weight model at its scale. Tiny Aya delivers state-of-the-art translation quality, strong multilingual understanding, top-quality target language responses, and broad language coverage in a model small enough to run locally, even on consumer hardware and mobile ph

title: Security Risks in AI Supply Chains
summary: A new report by the Coalition for Secure AI details the unfamiliar security risks that underpin AI supply chains, and how enterprises can tackle them.

title: Smarter, faster enterprise AI deployment
summary: How to deploy AI models for enterprises to meet cost, security, scaling and other key challenges proactively — before they become a drag on AI projects.

title: AI Infrastructure: Key Components for Building Your AI Stack | Cohere
summary: AI infrastructure is the hardware, software, and networking ecosystem needed for artificial intelligence. Learn the key components for building an AI stack.

title: Generative AI in Marketing: Use Cases and Benefits | Cohere
summary: Generative AI is transforming modern marketing. Explore real-world use cases and ways to integrate AI into your marketing campaigns.

title: Enterprise AI: What is Enterprise Artificial Intelligence?
summary: Learn what enterprise AI is, how artificial intelligence can power enterprise software, and how it drives innovation, automation, and growth.

title: Cohere Transcribe: state-of-the-art speech recognition
summary: Unmatched accuracy and speed. Transcribe converts your business’ audio data into precise text for search, analytics, and automation.

summary: The team behind FlashAttention and ThunderKittens — how Together AI's kernel researchers close the gap between GPU hardware and production AI.

title: Aurora
summary: 1.25x over a well-trained static speculator. Aurora is an open-source RL framework that turns speculative decoding from a one-time offline setup into a self-improving system that learns from every request it serves.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned to install an AI agent on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as a new native product for computer-based agent use cases.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announcement
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company describes it as deeply optimized at the training level for core agent capabilities.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering. The company says it achieves open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities, with strong benchmark results including SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance at the 100B-class level. It is also described as supporting tool use natively and handling up to 128K context.

title: AutoGLM agent model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization challenges while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: 2025 annual results announcement
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it would publish its full-year 2025 results on March 31, 2026. The notice identifies the company as listed in Hong Kong under stock code 02513.HK.

title: CogAgent-9B open source for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader agent ecosystem. The company said the model was trained from GLM-4V-9B and is specialized for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS concept, AutoGLM and GLM-PC launch
summary: Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. The announcement framed them as part of the company's push to advance the large-model agent ecosystem.

ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement tied to its foundation model organization.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview availability of the model for public evaluation or comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a formal model release in the company's model lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release focused on improved generation quality.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement signals a new version release of the Seedance model.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as delivering advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes stronger reasoning capabilities for math-focused tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model milestone in the Seed family.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro, promoted with the tagline 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The announcement suggests a multimodal model update combining audio and visual capabilities.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations through evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free Baichuan-M3-Plus API access to organizations serving medical professionals. The program is aimed at clinical decision support and medical education, positioning Baichuan as infrastructure for China's healthcare AI ecosystem.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Turbo, a newly released model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. The company says it improves usability by more than 10% over Baichuan4, lowers deployment and inference costs, and delivers faster first-token and token streaming speeds.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Air, a newly released MoE model built with its PRI architecture and optimized for enterprise applications. The company highlights very low inference cost and strong performance, claiming leading timeliness versus major international MoE models.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced as a commercially usable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning and low hallucination characteristics. The company positions it as a high-performing open medical model with consultation capabilities and 235 billion parameters.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. It features 32 billion parameters and a 32K context window, targeting efficient medical inference workloads.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as Baichuan's first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The model has 14 billion parameters, was trained with 20T of medical-enhanced corpus, and supports a 32K context window.

title: Baichuan2-13B released as an open commercial multilingual model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual large language model. The company says it significantly improves over the previous 13B generation in math, coding, safety, reasoning, and semantic understanding.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical business outcomes.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as an open-source Mixture-of-Experts large language model and described it as global state of the art. This is a model announcement emphasizing performance leadership and open-source availability.

title: 01.AI’s LLM One-box Solution Machine receives top-level CAICT certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification signals external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI reported that Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev met with CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The meeting is a notable company news event indicating high-level international engagement.

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
